params.name: Arnolfini Portrait
params.description: This painting is considered a milestone in portrait art during the Ned Land Renaissance, created by Jan van Eyck for the Italian merchant Arnolfini and his wife. The vivid depiction of the newlyweds at home goes beyond traditional portraiture by incorporating rich symbolic elements and detailed domestic scenes, creating a space filled with symbolic meaning. With its almost photographic realism, the painting pioneered the deep portrayal of the psychological state of its subjects, establishing a n …
